note: World-drop item icons @ 64x64 on solid black. One per map's rare worldDrop. Each icon must read instantly as the correct item TYPE (sword, dagger, staff, etc.) at thumbnail size — lead the prompt with the item type, use theming only as material/color modifiers. Diagonal 3/4 inventory-icon framing, single centered object, painterly, crisp silhouette, no background.

sprites.name: icon_bog_fang
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a curved single-edged DAGGER with a fang-shaped blade, bone-colored blade dripping green venom, bound leather grip, swamp-green and chartreuse palette, clearly readable as a dagger, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_slag_tooth
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a PENDANT NECKLACE — a hardened scrap-metal tooth hanging from a short iron chain, rust-pitted metal, warm bone-grey and rusted iron palette, clearly readable as a necklace accessory, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_glacial_claw
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a CLAWED GAUNTLET weapon — armored fist with three curved ice-blue claws extending from the knuckles, translucent glacial material with cyan inner glow, frost-rimed edges, clearly readable as a claw weapon, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_moss_ward
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a circular AMULET on a braided cord, round wooden disc wrapped in living moss with a glowing green spore-gem in the center, vibrant green with teal bioluminescence, clearly readable as an amulet accessory, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_ember_core
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a STAFF topped with a molten orb focus, long dark wooden shaft with a cracked obsidian orb at the top glowing with molten orange-red core, ember palette, clearly readable as a mage staff weapon, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_frost_plate
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a CHESTPLATE ARMOR — symmetrical breastplate with sculpted pectoral plates and a central sternum ridge, pale blue ice-forged metal with silver rivets and frost crystal accents, clearly readable as a chest armor piece, front-facing inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_void_scepter
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a SCEPTER WEAPON — long dark ornate rod with a metal claw grip at the top holding a floating violet void-orb crackling with purple energy, deep purple and magenta palette, clearly readable as a scepter weapon, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background

sprites.name: icon_magma_blade
sprites.prompt: painterly JRPG inventory icon of a two-handed GREATSWORD, long straight double-edged blade with a cross-guard and wrapped grip, blackened iron blade with glowing red-orange molten fissures running along the center fuller, ember palette, clearly readable as a greatsword weapon, diagonal 3/4 inventory framing blade pointing up, single centered object, crisp silhouette, pure solid black background
